official_pick_rules.note: Lab Rating is setup quality. It is not win probability. Official picks require both strong win probability and strong setup quality.

summary: No official picks cleared the stricter rules. 4 value-watch setups and 1 watchlist game remain research-only. 4 games reached a Lab Rating of 75+ but did not clear every official gate.

lab_score_breakdown.note: Lab Rating grades setup quality. It is not win probability.

games.read: Washington Nationals is a value watch, not an official pick. LyDia projects 64.8% against a 53.1% no-vig market number, a 11.7% model edge at -118. Lab Rating 9.1/10: model edge 35, pitcher 23.75, bullpen 12.36, market 15, base 5. The setup is strong, but official picks require at least 72.0% model probability and 8.0/10 Lab Rating. Lineup check: Washington Nationals is swinging a hot bat (+0.110 OPS); Colorado Rockies is in a cold stretch (-0.052 OPS). Recent form supports this side as well.

model_v3.note: shadow A/B — does not drive picks

pick_team.label: Normal
pick_team.workload_read: Manageable recent workload. Bullpen should still be part of the full-game read.
pick_team.score_reason: Normal (4.9/10): 7 relief innings over the last three days, 1 arm pitched back-to-back days, and the pen was hit hard for 10 runs in that stretch. 7 reliever appearances in the window.
pick_team.formula: 45 + ((Last 3 BP IP - 9) x 3.5) + ((Last game BP IP - 3) x 4) + (Back-to-back arms x 6) + clamp((Last 3 BP runs - 4) x 1.5, -6, 12)

context_only.note: Reliever counts are displayed for context only and do not add score points.
